scope: Current yandex-office capability-map build after extracting Cloud to the standalone yandex-cloud skill.

checks.name: capability inventory and generated output validation
capability JSON parse check
checks.command: jq empty config.json config.skill.json capabilities/methods.json capabilities/matrix.json capabilities/method-scope-map.json capabilities/atomic.client_id.json

checks.name: secret/live-id redaction spot check
checks.command: rg for raw OAuth tokens, private email-shaped values, and Yandex diagnostic ids in capabilities/task artifacts

notes: All 315 inventoried methods have matrix cells.
method-scope-map.json intentionally contains only methods with successful public, one_of, or all_of capability results.
Five SMTP methods remain unclear_needs_retest from this host.
mail.imap.uid.delete_matching.live_realty is a negative/safety probe for mail:imap_ro and has no successful method-scope-map entry.
Cloud infrastructure is no longer part of yandex-office and was extracted to the private yandex-cloud skill.
Runtime token selection from method-scope-map.json is not implemented yet; see notes/runtime-method-scope-map-integration.md.
